subcodes.first_line: That pure soul hath hastened to the luminous realm, and that bright star hath ascended to the everlasting horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آن جان پاک بجهان تابناک شتافت و آن ستاره روشن بافق ابدی صعود نمود
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom
